case_title: ANGULO, FRANCISCO GARCIA vs. ESTAGIN, MIRELLA AN IND.& DBA JENNIFERS JANITORIAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGULO, FRANCISCO GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT ESTAGIN, MIRELLA AN IND.& DBA JENNIFERS JANITORIAL
